title: Daily Memo: US and Iran Bolster Forces
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Deployment. The United States is considering deploying an additional 10,000 troops to the Middle East, the Wall Street Journal reported, despite signals from the Trump administration that it wants to negotiate a settlement. The deployment would likely include infantry, armored vehicles and other troops to supplement the 5,000 Marines and paratroopers from the 82nd Airborne […]

The post Daily Memo: US and Iran Bolster Forces appeared first on Geopolitical Futures.
full_text:
Deployment. The United States is considering deploying an additional 10,000 troops to the Middle East, the Wall Street Journal reported, despite signals from the Trump administration that it wants to negotiate a settlement. The deployment would likely include infantry, armored vehicles and other troops to supplement the 5,000 Marines and paratroopers from the 82nd Airborne […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years. GPF is non-ideological, analyzes the world and forecasts the future using geopolitics: political, economic, military and geographic dimensions at the foundation of a nation.
